048.title: Lesson   48   Do   you   like...?
048.text:
Lesson  48  Do  you  like...?
Do  you  want  ...?

I.Give  correct  replies  to the  sentences  according  to  the  exam-
ples.  仿照例句写出下列各句的对应句。
1.There's  a  small  apple  on  the  plate.(big)
I don't  want  a  small  one.I  want  a  big  one.
2.There  are  some  red  apples  in  the  basket.(green)
I don't  want  any  red  ones.I  want  some  green  ones.
3.This  ice  cream  is  for  you.(that)

4.Here's  a  cup  of  coffee  for  you.(a  cup  of  tea)

5.I’m  going  to  give  you  an  old  handbag.(new)

6.There  are  some  short  pencils  in  the  box.(long)

7.Here  are  two  blue  hats.(red)

8.There  are  some  biscuits  in  the  cupboard.(a  cake)

9.Here's  a  cup.(a  glass)

10.I'm going to buy you a bottle of beer.(wine)

II.  Answer  the  questions  according  to  the  example. 仿照例句回 答下列问题。
1.Do  you  like  cheese  and  butter?
I  like  cheese,but  I  don't  like  butter.
2.Do  you  like  green  tea  and  black  tea?

3.Do

like  red  wine  and  white  wine?

4.Do  you  like  honey  and  jam?

5.Do  you  like  white  clothes  and  black  clothes?

6.Do  you  like  oranges  and  bananas?

7.Do  you  like  American  cars  and  Korean  cars?

8.Do  you  like  English  and  German?

9.Do  you  like  Mercedes  and  Ford?

10.Do  you  like  cakes  and  biscuits?

Lesson 50  He  likes...
But  he  doesn't  like  ...

他喜欢 ……
但是他不喜欢 ……

I.  Combine  each  pair  of  sentences  according  to  the  example. 仿 照例句合并下列句子。
1.He  wants  some  apples./He  doesn't  want  any  oranges.
He  wants  some  apples,but  he  doesn't  want  any  oranges.
2.He  likes  butter./He  doesn't  like  cheese.

3.Emma  likes  honey./She  doesn’t  like  sugar.

4.John  likes  grapes./He  doesn't  like  apples.

5.Mrs.Bird  wants  two  fresh  lettuces./She  doesn't  want any garden peas.

6.Her husband  likes  coffee./He  doesn't  like  milk.

7.She  wants  some  jam./She  doesn’t  want  any  butter.

8.Sophie  wants  some  bread./She  doesn't  want  any  cakes.

9.That  man  wants  some  eggs./He  doesn't  want  any  mince.

10.The  girl  likes  peaches./She  doesn't  like  bananas.

11.His  son  likes  beef./He  doesn't  like  lamb.

12.The  old  woman  wants  some  new  potatoes./She  doesn't want  any  fresh  cabbages.

II.Ask and answer questions,using the cues given according to
the example. 仿照例句用所给的词提问并回答。
1.you/pears/peaches/my  son
Do  you  like  pears  or  peaches?
I  like  pears,but  my  son  doesn't.He  likes  peaches.
2.he/jam/honey/his  brother

3.she/grapes/bananas/her  husband

4.you/tea/coffee/Jane

5.your  father/beans/peas/my  mother

6.you/beef/lamb/Helen

7.your  brother/wine/whisky/his  wife

8.  Sam/tomatoes/potatoes/Tim

051.title: Lesson  51   A   pleasant   climate
051.text:
Lesson  51  A  pleasant  climate

宜人的气候

I.  Answer the  questions,using  the  cues  given  according  to  the example. 仿照例句用所给的词回答下列问题。
1.When  does  the  sun  shine  every  day?(in  July  and  August) The  sun  shines  every  day  in  July  and  August.
2.When  is  it  always  windy?(in  winter  and  early  spring)

3.When  does  spring  come?(in  March)

4.When  does  it  rain  sometimes?(in  April  and  November)

5.When  is  it  often  sunny?(in  autumn)

6.When  is  it  always  warm?(in  May  and  October)

7.When  does  it  often  snow?(in  December  and  January)

8.When  is  it  sometimes  warm?(in  winter)

9.When  is  the  climate  often  pleasant?(in  May,June  and October)

10.When  is  it  always  very  cold?(in  December,January  and

February)

II.Add the frequency adverbs given to the sentences and rewrite
them. 用所给频率副词改写下列句子。
1.It's  hot  in  August.(always)

2.He's  late  for  class.(sometimes)

3.It's  very  pleasant  here.(always)

4.The  students  are  hard-working.(always)

5.It's  windy  in  December  and  January.(often)

6.The  policemen  are  very  tired.(often)

7.Students  are  lazy.(sometimes)

8.The  weather  is  bad  here  in  winter.(always)

9.We're  busy  in  spring.(often)

10.The  steak  in  this  shop  is  good.(always)

III.Answer the questions according to the real situation in your
part of China. 根据当地的实际情况回答下列问题。
1.Where  are  you  from?

2.What's  the  climate  like  in  your part  of  China?

3.Does  spring  usually  come  in  May?

4.What's  the  weather  like  in  summer?What  about autumn?
5.What's  the  weather  like  in  January?

6.Does  it  rain  every  day  in  autumn?

7.Does  the  sun  shine  every  day  in  spring?

8.Does  it  always  snow  in  December?

9.Do  you  like  spring  and  summer?

10.What's  the  weather  like  today?

(often/sometimes)

(sometimes/often)

057.title: Lesson 57   An  unusual  day
057.text:
Lesson 57  An  unusual  day

很不平常的一天

I.Make  sentences,using  the  cues  given  according  to  the  exam-
ple.  仿照例句用所给的词造句。
1.John/often  play  football/basketball  now
John often plays football,but he  is playing basketball now.
2.the boys/often swim in the sea in summer/in the river today

3.Mary/often  buy  sugar/some  honey  at  the  moment

4.my  sister/watch  television  every  evening/listen  to  her stereo  this  evening

5.our  teacher/often  stand  in  front  of  the  blackboard/sit  at the  desk  today

6.we/often  walk  along  the  banks  of  the  river/in  the  park today

7.he/usually  arrive  home  early/come  home  late  this  after- noon

8.Ken  and  Ann/often  speak  English/French  now

9.I/often  drink  coffee/tea  at  the  moment

10.Sam/usually  do  his  homework  in  school/at  home  today

II.Answer  the  questions,using  the  cues  given  according  to  the
examples. 仿照例句用所给的词回答下列问题。
1.a.Is  your  daughter  reading  at  the  moment?(sleep)
No,she  isn't.She's  sleeping.  Does  she  usually  sleep  in  the  afternoon?(at  night)
No,she  doesn't.She  usually  sleeps  at  night.
b.Are  the  children  playing  in  the  garden  this  morning? (do  their  homework)

Do  they  often  do  their  homework  in  the  morning?(in the  afternoon)

c.Are  you  cooking  now?(eat  my  lunch)

Do you usually  eat  your lunch  at  this time  every  day? (early  in  the  afternoon)

d.Is Tom going to school by bike today?(on foot)

Does he often go to school on foot?(by car)

e.  Is  it  raining  now?(snow)

Does  it  usually  snow  in  February?(January)

2.a.Is  Mrs.Smith  going  to  the  shops  this  afternoon?(talk to her friends)
No,she  isn't.She's  talking  to  her  friends.	 Does  she usually  see her friends in the  afternoon?(read magazines  at  home)
No,she  doesn't.She  usually  reads  magazines  at
home  in  the  afternoon.  b.Are  you  watching  television  now?(play  games)

Do you often play games in the evening?(watch televi- sion)

c.Is  Helen  working  at  the  moment?(drink  tea)

Does  she  drink  tea  at  this  time  every  day?(drink coffee)

d.Is  Sam  eating  his  breakfast  now?(shave)

Does he usually shave at this time in the morning?(lis- ten  to  the  radio)

e. Are they cleaning the classroom windows now?(clean the  doors)

Do  they  clean  the  doors  every  day?(wash  the  floor)

No,I  don't  read  a  newspaper  every  day,but  I  often  read  a  newspaper.

Do  you  write  home  every  week?(sometimes)

Does she often sweep the floor?(sometimes)

Do  they  always  watch  television  at  night?(sometimes)

2.a.What  is  the  postman  doing  now?(deliver  letters)
He  is  delivering  letters.

d.What  are  the  children  doing  now?(do  their  homework)

Do  they  always  do  their  homework  in  the  afternoon? (usually  in  the  evening)

e.What  is  the  keyboard  operator  doing  now?(type  let- ters)

Does  he  often  type  letters  at  noon?(usually  at  nine  in the  morning)

103.title: Lesson 103   The French test

No,it's  too  high  for  him  to  reach.

He  was  too  young  to  go  to  school.

d.The  little  dog  was  very  weak.He  couldn't  walk.

e.The  news  was  very  good.It  couldn't  be  true.

f.The  boys  were  very  tired.They  couldn't  climb  the  wall.

g.  We  were  very  late.We  couldn't  catch  the  train.

h.I  was  very  stupid.I  couldn't  understand  the  maths problem.

2.a.The  box  was  too  heavy.He  couldn't  lift  it.
The  box  was  too  heavy  for  him  to  lift.
b.The  food  was  too  hot.They  couldn't  eat  it.

c.The  trousers  were  too  short.He  couldn't  wear  them.

e.  The  work  was  too  hard.They  couldn't  do  it.

g.  The  questions  were  too  difficult.They  couldn’t  answer them.

h.The  bag  was  too  big.She  couldn't  carry  it.

仿照例句合并下列句子。

The  shelf  is  low  enough  for  him  to  reach.

c.The  boxes  are  very  light.He  can  lift  them.

d.The  questions  are  very  easy.They  can  understand them.

e.The  stereo  is  very  loud.They  can  hear  it.

f.The  pear  is  very  soft.The  old  woman  can  eat  it.

g.The  juice  is  very  sweet.You  can  drink  it.

h.The wall  is  very  low.He  can  climb  it.

2.a.The  knife  is  very  sharp.It  can  cut  the  beef.
The  knife  is  sharpenough  to  cut  the  beef.
b.I'm  very  tired.I  can  sleep  for  twenty-four  hours.

c.He's  very  thirsty.He  can  drink  four  glasses  of  water.

d.I’m  very  hungry.I  can  eat  five  cakes.

6.I  (sit)down  when  the  telephone  rang  again.
7.When  they  went  into  the  cinema,the  film  (begin).
8.He  took  the  picture  down  when  I  (put)it  up  on the  wall.
III.  Make  sentences  according  to  the  example. 仿照例句造句。
1.he/make  a  bookcase/be  proud  of  himself
He had made a bookcase so he was proud of himself.He
had  never  been  so  proud  of  himself  before.
2.he/work  for  twelve  hours/be  tired

3.she/run  for  five  miles/be  thirsty

4.he/cook  a  meal  for  his  family/be  proud  of  himself

5.she/fail  the  exam/be  sad

6.he/pass  the  English  test/be  excited

121.title: Lesson 121   The  man  in  a  hat
121.text:
Lesson 121  The  man  in  a  hat

I.C  omplete  the  sentences  according  to  the  example. 仿照例句 完成下列句子。
1.A  teacher  is  someone  who/that  teaches (teach).
2.A  nurse  is  (look  after  sick  people).
3.A  tailor  is  (make  clothes).
4.A  cook  is  (cook  food).
5.A  mechanic  is  (repair  machines).
6.A  sailor  is  (sail  on  a  ship).
7.A  carpenter  is  (make  things  with wood).
8.A  gardener  is  (work  in  a  garden).
II.  Rewrite  the  sentences  according to the  example. 仿照例句改 写下列句子。
1.I  saw  those  men  yesterday.(Those/the  men)
Those  are  the  men  who(m)/that  I  saw  yesterday.

3.That  mechanic  repaired  my  car.(That/the  mechanic)

4.We  visited  that  house  a  month  ago.(That/the  house)

5.That dog chased our cat on Saturday.(That/the dog)

6.I  bought  these  magazines  yesterday.(These/magazines)

7.My  father  wants  to  buy  that  car.(That/the  car)

8.The  policeman  caught  that  thief  last  night.(That/thief)

III.Fill  in  the  blanks  with“that”,“which”,“who”or
“whom”.用 that,which,wh  o 或 whom填空。
1.The  man  is  locking  the  door  is  Mr.Smith.
2.The  pencil  he  was  writing  with  was  broken.
3.The  knife  you lent me is not very sharp.
4.The  girl  told  me the news is not here now.
5.I  have  lost  the  watch  my  father  gave  me.
6.The  boy  is  on  the bike  is Mike.
7.The  person  I was  speaking to was my uncle.
8.The  men  I met could not help me.
9.The  bus  takes  us  to  school  often  breaks down.
10.The  friends  she had come to the party with left just now.
11.  The  table  he  was  standing  on  has  a  broken leg.
12.The  man  I  got  the  information  from  is  not here.
13.This  is  the  camera  I took a lot of photographs
with.
14.The  person  he  asked  first  did  not  know.

15.The  one  answers first will win a prize.
16.I  have  found  the  pen  I  lost.
17.The  trees  they  climbed  were  not  very  tall.
18.The  books  are  on  my  table  belong  to  my brother.

122.title: Lesson 122    Who(whom),which        and tha t
122.text:
Lesson 122  Who(whom),which  and tha t

关系代词

I.Combine  each  pair  of  sentences,using“which”or“that”
according  to  the  example. 仿照例句用 which  或 that 合并下 列句子。
1.The  book  is  very  interesting./I'm  reading  the  book.
The  book  which/that  I'm  reading  is  zery  interesting.
2.The  books  were  very  expensive./I  bought  the  books.

3.The trees fell down./The trees were big.

4.The  dresses  were  too  expensive./She  wanted  the  dresses.

5.She  wants  a  doll  for  her  birthday./The  doll  walks  and talks.

6.I've  lost  the  umbrella./I  bought  the  umbrella  last  week.

7.I  passed  the  exams./The  exams  were  not  very  difficult.

8.This  is  the  car./I've  just  bought  the  car.

9.The  street  is  called  Fifth  Avenue./We  are  walking  along

the  street.

10.The  store  is  across  the  street./The  store  is  the  biggest  in this  city.

II.Combine  each  pair  of  sentences,using“who”,“whom”or
"that"according  to  the  example.  仿 照 例 句 用 who,  whom 或 that  合并下列句子。
1.The  man  is  not  here./You  were  talking  to  the  man.
The  man  who(m)/that  you  were  talking  to  is  not  here.
2.The  teacher  was  standing  at  the  front./We  handed  the papers  to  the  teacher.

3.I'm  looking  for  someone./He  has  a  mobile  phone  to  sell.

4.The  young  man  is  a  doctor./We  just  saw  the  young man.

5.The  person  helped  me./The  person  was  a  stranger.

6.The  man  had  run  away  with  a  lot  of  money./The  police wanted  the  man.

7.At  last  I  met  the  man./I  had  heard  so  much  about  the man.
8.The  policemen  are  on  traffic  duty./The  policemen  look very  tired.

9. This is the girl./The girl found yourmoney.

10. They looked for the men./The men were selling tickets.

Lesson 123  A trip to Australia

澳大利亚之行

I.  Combine  each  pair  of  sentences  according  to  the  example.仿 照例句合并下列句子。

6.The  knife  slipped  and  cut  his  hand./He  was  using  the knife.

9.The  dress  was  green./She  put  on  the  dress.

10.The book was very  interesting./He  read the book  last week.

I.Combine  each  pair  of  sentences  according  to  the  examples.
仿照例句合并下列句子。
1.I  know  the  policeman./The  policeman  is  speaking  to John.
I  know  the  policeman  who  is  speaking  to  John.

The  girl  I  greeted  goes  to  my  school.

9.The man  came  to  thank you./You  helped the man.

10.The  man  is  going  into  that  building./We  want  to  see  the man.

according to the example. 仿照例句改写下列句子，省去关
系代词。

The  boy  on  the  blue  bike  is  my  son.

Department  Building.

9.There's  the  boy  losing  his  book.

10.This  is  the  kitten  Jane  finding  in  the  garden.

125.title: Lesson 125   Tea for two
125.text:
Lesson 125  Tea for two

两 个 人 一 起 喝 茶

I.  Answer  the  questions  according  to  the  example. 仿照例句回 答下列问题。
1.Do  you  have  to  clean  the  blackboard  today?
Yes,I have  to  clean  it  today  and  I  shall  have  to  clean  it
tomorrow,too.

5.Do  you  have  to  see  the  dentist  today?

6.Does  he  have  to  wear  that  tie  today?

7.Does  she  have  to  help  her  mother  today?

8.Do  you  have  to  water  the  garden  today?

II.Answer  the  questions  according  to  the  examples. 仿照例句 回答下列问题。
1.a.Do  you  have  to  take  an  examination  today?
No,I  don't  have  to  take  one  today,but  I  had  to  take one  yesterday.

No,she  doesn't  have  to  type  any  today,but  she  had
to  type  some  yesterday.  c.Do  I  have  to  water  the  flowers  today?

d.Do you have to  clean  yourbike  today?

e.Do  we  have  to  clean  the  windows  today?

f.Does  he  have  to  buy  some  butter  today?

2.a.Do  you  have  to  go  to  school  today?
No,I  don't,and  I  won't  have  to  go  to  school  tomor-
row,either.
b.Do  I have to  go  to bed  early  today?

c.Do  you  have  to  do  your homework  today?

d.Does  she  have  to  wash  any  clothes  today?

e.Do  I  have  to  do  the  shopping  today?

f.Do  we  have  to  hand  in  our  papers  today?

II.  Answer  the  questions  according  to  the  example. 仿照例句 回答下列问题。
1.Do I have to wear shoes and socks?
You must wear shoes but you don't need to zwear socks.

2.Do  I  have  to  wash  my  hands  and  face?

3.Do we have to  close  the  door  and  the  windows?

4.Does he have  to wear  a  shirt  and  a  tie?

5.Do we have to  go  to  school  today  and  tomorrow?

9.Does  she  have  to  look  after  the  baby  and  the  cat?

10.Do  I  have  to  put  on  my  coat  and  hat?

buy both books so I bought only one.

take  a taxi.I  can't  wait  for  a bus.

do all the work by yourself.I can help you if you want.

ple.  仿照例句用所给的词编写对话。

It  can't  be  true.

11.I  don't  believe  they're  farmers.

12.I  don't  believe  it's  so  hot  there.

12.I  think  you  are  very  tired.

He  must  be  ill.

He  can't  be  in  the  library.

He  can  swim  well.

10.It's  impossible  that  he  is  watching  television.

11.I’m  sure  they  are  on  their  way  home.

13.I  don't  believe  that  house  is  very  expensive.

19.I  think  your son  is  a  clever  boy.

10.It's  the  13th  tomorrow,so  it  be the 12th today.  II.Answer the questions according to the example. 仿照例句回

时 速 7 0 英 里

You  can't  have  seen  me.I  wasn't  there.

I'm  sure you  left your case there.

ing  to  the  example. 仿照例句用can't  have  been/done 改写下 列句子。

II.Rewrite  the  sentences,using“must  have  been/done”accord-
ing to the example.  仿照例句用must have been/done 改写 下列句子。

新概念英语
语 法 练 习

《新概念英语》—是一套风摩全球的经典英语教程，白 1967年首次出版以来，受到了世界各地英语学习者的青睐，也在  中国的英语学习者中赢得子无可比拟的盛誉。外语教学与研究出  版社于1997年推出的《新概念英语》(新版)教程是由该书作者  亲自修订的唯一新版，更加注重对学生英语听、说、读、写四项  基本技能的培养，更加符合中国英语学习者的特点和学习习惯。
这套《新概念英语》(新版)辅导从书由原中方编著者何其 莘教授亲自主持编写，原英方编著者L.G.Alexander  的夫人 Julia_Alexander及其长期合作者Roy_Kingsbury亲自审订，二是
为中国厂大英语爱好者度身定做的一套配套辅导用书。它切合中 国广大读者的学习实际，为学好《新概念英语》一(新版)一提供了 全方位、多层次的解决方案，不仅能使英语爱好者在学习过程中  最大限度地发挥自己的潜能，也能使他们从《新概念英语》(新  版 )中得到更多的收获。

封面设计：张一媛

139.title: Lesson  139    Is    that   you,John?

Lesson  139  Is  that  you,John?

I.Change the following into indirect questions according to the

3.“Why  must  you  leave?”

4.“Who  are  they?”

8.“When  will  the  next  train  be  here?”

13.“Why  is  the  boy  crying?”

14.“Where  will  you  go  next  weekend?”

13.“How  does  she  know  the  answer?”

14.“Why  did  you  buy  that  book?”

15.“Why do you want to be a doctor?”

the  example. 仿照例句将下列直接引语改为间接引语。
